summary: Tested 6 assertions: 6 passed, 0 failed. Build compiles cleanly for bare-metal target (VAL-BUILD-001). 14 shaping tests pass on host (VAL-BUILD-002). Custom TrueType parser removed from truetype.rs, replaced by read-fonts in shaping library (VAL-RASTER-003). Old ASCII GlyphCache constants fully removed (VAL-MIGRATE-001). Old draw_proportional_string functions fully removed (VAL-MIGRATE-002). Compositor uses ShapedGlyph array iteration, old byte-iteration pattern eliminated (VAL-MIGRATE-003).
